---
title: "Biographies of Good Women"
sort_title: "Biographies of Good Women"
slug: "Biographies of Good Women"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
---




Click this link for an online text of an 1865 (Second Series) edition of[The Biographies of Good Women](http://books.google.co.uk/books?id=24Y4AAAAYAAJ&printsec=frontcover&dq=Biographies%2Bof%2BGood%2BWomen&source=bl&ots=0BnxutzXeb&sig=C8zYJim9sT7M3fqVxawHv_oKcIY&hl=en&ei=QIFbS72vH8eQjAfYp5CVAg&sa=X&oi=book_result&ct=result&resnum=1&ved=0CAwQ6AEwAA#v=onepage&q=&f=false)

CLICK THIS alternative link[The Biographies of Good Women](https://archive.org/details/BiographiesOfGoodWomen)which takes you straight to the book in the Internet Archive.  
  

**Biographies of Good Women (Second Series 1865)**

#### by  
Charlotte Mary Yonge, Ellen J. Millington

Contains short biographies about

Vittoria Colonna, Margaret More, Madame Duplessis Mornay, La Mere Angelique, Madame Guyon, Madame de la Garaye, Meta Klopstock, Mrs Trimmer, Hannah More, Elisabeth of France, the Five Sisters of Noailles, Mrs Siddons, Mrs Lyde Browne, Mrs Leadbrater, Harriet M. Bowdler, Dorothy Wordsworth, Sarah Martin and Eugenie de Guerin.
